parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_vars WHERE key='admin_api_token' LIMIT 1;

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings) AS bookings_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE source='realtycalendar-ical') AS rc_bookings_count, (SELECT MAX(updated_at) FROM bookings WHERE source='realtycalendar-ical') AS latest_rc_sync, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_templates) AS templates_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE guest_chat_id IS NOT NULL) AS guest_connected_count;

SELECT id, apartment_id, apartment_name, checkin_at::text, checkout_at::text, nights, source, status, COALESCE(guest_name,'') AS guest_name, COALESCE(guest_username,'') AS guest_username, (guest_chat_id IS NOT NULL) AS guest_connected, journey_sent, 'https://t.me/GuestGelen_bot?start='||id AS deep_link, updated_at FROM bookings ORDER BY checkin_at ASC, apartment_id ASC;
SELECT key, channel, lang, body, active, updated_at FROM message_templates ORDER BY channel, key;

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(g ORDER BY g.estimated_loss DESC NULLS LAST, g.gap_start)
   FROM (
     SELECT gw.apartment_id, a.name AS apartment_name,
            to_char(gw.gap_start,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS gap_start,
            to_char(gw.gap_end,'YYYY-MM-DD')   AS gap_end,
            gw.nights, gw.estimated_loss::float AS estimated_loss,
            gw.recommendation, gw.status,
            to_char(gw.detected_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS detected_at
     FROM gap_windows gw
     JOIN apartments a ON a.id = gw.apartment_id
     WHERE gw.status = 'open' AND gw.gap_start >= CURRENT_DATE
   ) g
  ) AS gap_windows,
  (SELECT json_agg(cp ORDER BY cp.date_from)
   FROM (
     SELECT source, title, url, location, max_guests, rooms,
            to_char(date_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_from,
            to_char(date_to,'YYYY-MM-DD')   AS date_to,
            price_per_night::float AS price_per_night,
            rating::float AS rating, reviews_count, notes,
            to_char(collected_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS collected_at
     FROM competitor_prices ORDER BY date_from
   ) cp
  ) AS competitor_prices,
  (SELECT json_agg(r ORDER BY r.date_from)
   FROM (
     SELECT apartment_id, to_char(date_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_from,
            to_char(date_to,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_to, nights,
            current_price::float AS current_price,
            market_median::float AS market_median,
            recommended_price::float AS recommended_price,
            recommendation_type, reason, confidence::float AS confidence,
            status
     FROM pricing_recommendations
     WHERE status IN ('draft','approved') AND date_from >= CURRENT_DATE
     ORDER BY date_from
   ) r
  ) AS pricing_recommendations,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM gap_windows WHERE status='open' AND gap_start>=CURRENT_DATE) AS total_gaps,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(estimated_loss),0)::float FROM gap_windows WHERE status='open' AND gap_start>=CURRENT_DATE) AS total_estimated_loss,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM gap_windows WHERE status='open' AND nights=1 AND gap_start>=CURRENT_DATE) AS one_night_gaps,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM gap_windows WHERE status='open' AND nights=2 AND gap_start>=CURRENT_DATE) AS two_night_gaps,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM gap_windows WHERE status='open' AND nights=3 AND gap_start>=CURRENT_DATE) AS three_night_gaps,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM competitor_prices) AS competitor_count,
  (SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY price_per_night)::float
   FROM competitor_prices
   WHERE date_from <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days'
     AND date_to   >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days') AS market_median,
  (SELECT MIN(price_per_night)::float FROM competitor_prices
   WHERE date_from <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days'
     AND date_to   >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days') AS market_min,
  (SELECT MAX(price_per_night)::float FROM competitor_prices
   WHERE date_from <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days'
     AND date_to   >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days') AS market_max,
  (SELECT AVG(price_per_night)::float FROM competitor_prices
   WHERE date_from <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days'
     AND date_to   >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days') AS market_avg,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM pricing_recommendations WHERE status='draft' AND date_from>=CURRENT_DATE) AS recommendations_count

parameters.jsCode:
const j = ($('Webhook').first().json.body) || $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: {
  cp_source:        String(j.source        || ''),
  cp_title:         String(j.title         || ''),
  cp_url:           String(j.url           || ''),
  cp_location:      String(j.location      || ''),
  cp_max_guests:    j.max_guests    ? String(Number(j.max_guests))    : '',
  cp_rooms:         j.rooms         ? String(Number(j.rooms))         : '',
  cp_date_from:     String(j.date_from     || ''),
  cp_date_to:       String(j.date_to       || ''),
  cp_price:         String(Number(j.price_per_night) || 0),
  cp_rating:        j.rating        ? String(Number(j.rating))        : '',
  cp_reviews_count: j.reviews_count ? String(Number(j.reviews_count)) : '',
  cp_notes:         String(j.notes         || '')
} }];

parameters.query:
SELECT apartment_id, a.name AS apartment_name,
       to_char(pr.date_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_from,
       to_char(pr.date_to,'YYYY-MM-DD')   AS date_to,
       pr.nights, pr.current_price::float, pr.market_min::float,
       pr.market_median::float, pr.market_avg::float, pr.market_max::float,
       pr.recommended_price::float, pr.recommendation_type,
       pr.reason, pr.confidence::float, pr.source, pr.status,
       to_char(pr.created_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at
FROM pricing_recommendations pr
JOIN apartments a ON a.id = pr.apartment_id
WHERE pr.status IN ('draft','approved') AND pr.date_from >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY pr.date_from, pr.apartment_id

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { ok: true, action: 'pricing_recommendations', data: rows, count: rows.length } }];

const row = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  ok: true,
  action: 'revenue',
  gap_windows:           row.gap_windows           || [],
  competitor_prices:     row.competitor_prices     || [],
  pricing_recommendations: row.pricing_recommendations || [],
  summary: {
    total_gaps:           row.total_gaps           || 0,
    total_estimated_loss: row.total_estimated_loss || 0,
    one_night_gaps:       row.one_night_gaps       || 0,
    two_night_gaps:       row.two_night_gaps       || 0,
    three_night_gaps:     row.three_night_gaps     || 0,
    competitor_count:     row.competitor_count     || 0,
    market_min:           row.market_min    != null ? Number(row.market_min)    : null,
    market_median:        row.market_median != null ? Number(row.market_median) : null,
    market_avg:           row.market_avg    != null ? Number(row.market_avg)    : null,
    market_max:           row.market_max    != null ? Number(row.market_max)    : null,
    recommendations_count: row.recommendations_count || 0
  }
} }];

const row = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ok: true, action: 'revenue_add_competitor_price', id: row.id || null, message: 'competitor price added' } }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO competitor_prices
  (source, title, url, location, max_guests, rooms,
   date_from, date_to, price_per_night, rating, reviews_count, notes)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.cp_source }}',
  '{{ $json.cp_title }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_url }}',''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_location }}',''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_max_guests }}','')::integer,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_rooms }}','')::integer,
  '{{ $json.cp_date_from }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.cp_date_to }}'::date,
  {{ $json.cp_price }}::numeric,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_rating }}','')::numeric,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_reviews_count }}','')::integer,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.cp_notes }}','')
) RETURNING id::text AS id, source, title, price_per_night::float
